title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited:
Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Siemens Healthineers India Advisory Limited!
